questions.prompt: We want to make 5. We have 3 dots. Click to add more dots until you have 5.
questions.hint: Count on from 3: click once for 4, and click again for 5. How many did you add?

questions.prompt: If you have 4 apples, how many more do you need to make 5?
Make 5 on the ten frame. We have 2 dots already.
questions.hint: Add dots until the whole top row of the frame is full.

questions.prompt:
Fill in the blank:

3 and ___ make 5.
Make 5. We have 4 dots already. Click to add the last one.
questions.hint: Just one more empty square on the top row needs a dot.
